OverlayConfigEntry.description:
A consumer-tool config that bootstrap wrote (e.g. .vscode/mcp.json).

``action`` is the string the install flow emits today
(``created``, ``updated``, ``set``, ``unchanged``). Modeled as a
free string rather than a Literal so the contract does not block
bootstrap from introducing new actions before the protocol bumps.

action.description: What bootstrap did to the config (e.g. 'created', 'updated', 'set', 'unchanged').
action.title: Action

OverlayConfigEntry.title: OverlayConfigEntry

OverlaySurface.description: A single overlay surface entry (e.g. skills, commands, hooks).

source.description: Origin tier: 'shared' (symlinked from workbay-system), 'local' (target-owned), 'overlapping' (target overrides shared), 'generated' (per-agent surface produced by generate_agent_workflows.py during install — implementation note step 1), 'lifecycle' (implementation note hoisted Make fragment + runner package — copied, not symlinked, so the consumer can run `make context` without the workbay-system packaging tree).
source.title: Source

OverlaySurface.title: OverlaySurface

description:
Top-level shape of ``.workbay-overlay.json``.

Validated on write by ``workbay-bootstrap.install`` so the file
cannot drift silently. Consumers (drift detectors, doctor commands)
parse the same model on read.

mcp_servers.description: Sorted list of managed MCP server names bootstrap last wrote into ``.mcp.json`` / ``.vscode/mcp.json`` / ``.codex/config.toml``. Read by ``sync_mcp_configs(prune_removed_managed=True)`` as the authoritative previously-managed provenance so third-party launchers in those files are preserved across syncs.
mcp_servers.title: Mcp Servers

plugin_overrides_path.description: Optional explicit plugin override root recorded by bootstrap so later doctor/update/repair runs can reuse a non-default internal override location.
plugin_overrides_path.title: Plugin Overrides Path

remote_sha.description: Resolved 40-char git SHA at install time (git_overlay source).
remote_sha.title: Remote Sha

source_kind.description: Overlay delivery source: 'git_overlay' (a clone checked out at remote_ref), 'package' (an installed workbay-system distribution), or 'worktree' (the repo's own working tree / HEAD). Defaults to 'git_overlay' so manifests written before internal validate unchanged.
source_kind.title: Source Kind

stack_distribution.description: Meta-package anchor distribution recorded by package-source install/update when it is installed (implementation note: 'workbay'). None for legacy/pre-stack installs.
stack_distribution.title: Stack Distribution

stack_members.description: Mapping of stack member distribution name -> exact version pinned by the installed anchor's metadata. Doctor compares the live environment against this expectation (stack_drift).
stack_members.title: Stack Members

stack_version.description: Installed version of the stack anchor distribution at install/update time (package source only).
stack_version.title: Stack Version

title: BootstrapManifest
